one_time_description: Province of British Columbia funding of $5,000,000 allocated to Treaty Process segment, significantly above prior year of $1,095,814 total BC provincial funding
economic_notes: Five limited partnerships: Kitselas Development LP, Kitselas Forestry LP, Wai Wah Environmental LP, Kitselas Five Tier System LP, Kitselas Community Land LP. Combined GBE revenue $9,753,082 and net income $1,182,310. 40-unit housing project under construction in Gitaus ($20,511,860 WIP), to be transferred to Kitselas Housing Society upon completion. First Nation has guaranteed a RBC demand loan of $520,000 for Kitselas Forestry Limited Partnership.
notes: Large spike in Province of BC funding ($8,175,110 vs prior year $1,095,814), primarily due to $5,000,000 allocated to Treaty Process segment — likely a one-time settlement or treaty-related transfer. CMHC also significantly lower than prior year ($372,964 vs $3,220,977). 40-unit housing project under construction ($20,511,860 WIP out of total $30,658,283 WIP) to be transferred to Kitselas Housing Society with associated BC Housing Management Commission loan of $2,439,705 upon completion. No schedule of remuneration included. GBEs use December 31, 2023 year-end financial data. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC + BC Gaming + CMHC + DFO + FNHA + FNESC + Province of BC + TFN Treaty Society = 5014001+540512+372964+1078982+1791920+317796+8175110+760000 - note Government of Canada line shows $0 actual in 2024. osr = total revenue minus government transfers.
